title: Blueprint Crosswalk
description: Reviewable, reusable mapping from a foreign blueprint's structure (their swimlanes/columns/variants) onto the template data model (roles/layers/steps/paths). Built during translation (references/translate-playbook.md) and presented for user approval BEFORE any IR is generated. Invariant: every source element is either mapped or listed in `unmapped` with a reason — nothing is ever silently dropped.

format.description: v1 inputs: xlsx/CSV, markdown tables, FigJam via MCP; Miro only via CSV/board export.

file.description: Path or URL of the source blueprint.

scenario.description: Target scenario key in the IR this crosswalk populates.

lanes.description: Source swimlanes/rows -> target layers. N:1 merges are expressed as multiple lane mappings sharing one target_layer (set merge_note on each).

columns.description: Source columns/stages -> target scenario steps, in column order.

paths.description: Source variants/branches/boards -> target paths. A single-flow source maps to one happy path.

unmapped.description: REQUIRED bucket (may be empty) for every source element with no mapping. Typical dispositions: promote to an org-defined custom role, exclude with the user's consent, or leave pending for a follow-up pass.

target_layer.description: Target layer key in the IR.

target_role.description: Semantic role for the target layer (canonical or org-defined custom, e.g. Shostack's physical evidence -> a custom physical_evidence role). null = generic swimlane.

target_display_name.description: Locale map for the target layer's display label. Keep the org's own vocabulary — customize our layers to fit them, not the reverse.

merge_note.description: Present when several source lanes merge into one target layer (N:1): how cell content is combined and why.

target_step.description: Target step key in the IR.

target_path.description: Target path key in the IR.

disposition.description: pending = awaiting user decision; excluded = user consented to drop; custom_role = will become an org-defined role; merged = folded into a mapped element; deferred = later scenario/session.
